name: Greek Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Round Red OR White Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine potatoes and 5 cups water in a large saucepan; bring to a boil. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer until tender, about 15 minutes. Drain the potatoes and chill.
2. Cut the potatoes into 3/4-inch cubes. Combine with cucumber and tomatoes in a large bowl. Set aside.
3. Process garlic through the chute of a food processor while it is running; process for about 3 seconds or until finely chopped.
4. Add yogurt, feta cheese, oregano, and rosemary to the food processor. Process until smooth.
5. Add the yogurt mixture to the reserved potato mixture; toss gently to coat.
6. Garnish with parsley, olives, and onion rings if desired. Cover and chill thoroughly.
(For reference: Fat 1.3, Cholesterol 5.)
